title: Berger Non Drip Gloss 750ml Bitter Chocolate
description: Product description A non drip gloss for interior & exterior wood and metal. Directions Apply to clean, dry surfaces. Allow 24 hours drying time between coats. Shake well before use. Use in a well-ventilated area.
